title: Buddi Golden Eval Case
description: A single clinician-labeled golden case for the HCC suggestion eval harness. Every case must be reviewed by a board-certified clinician (clinician_id is required and must not be a placeholder outside of the seed set).

case_id.description: Unique case identifier, e.g. 'case_001_diabetic_ckd'. Must be stable across re-labels so the eval harness can track per-case deltas.

clinician_id.description: Identifier of the board-certified clinician who labeled this case. Must not be a placeholder — real labels require a real clinician_id. Format: 'advisor:dr-lastname' or institutional ID.

labeled_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this label was created or last reviewed.

specialty.description: Clinical specialty of the labeling clinician, e.g. 'primary_care', 'cardiology', 'nephrology', 'pulmonology', 'internal_medicine'.

tenant_id_hint.description: Always 'synthetic' for committed golden cases. Real tenant IDs only appear in the gitignored golden_set/ directory.

condition_category.description: Primary HCC condition category for coverage tracking. The 100-case set targets ~20 cases each across 5 categories.

note.description: Synthetic or Safe-Harbor de-identified clinical note text. Must not contain real PHI in committed files.

billed_codes.description: ICD-10-CM codes that were originally billed for this encounter.

expected_codes.description: ICD-10-CM codes a careful clinician would surface for this encounter. These count in precision/recall.

acceptable_alternatives.description: Alternative ICD-10-CM codes that are also clinically reasonable for this encounter. Surfacing one of these is NOT a false positive — it counts as a true positive for the acceptable-alternative variant of precision.

must_abstain_codes.description: ICD-10-CM codes the agent must NOT surface for this encounter. Any surfaced must-abstain code is a hard eval-gate failure.

evidence_spans.description: Map from expected/acceptable code to a verbatim substring of the note that justifies it. Used for the citation-accuracy metric (P-B2). Example: {"E11.22": "type 2 diabetes mellitus complicated by chronic kidney disease stage 3a"}.

edge_notes.description: Clinician notes about edge cases: why a code is borderline, why an alternative is acceptable, or what makes this case difficult.

notes.description: Free-text human-readable notes about this case (not used by the harness, surfaced in reports).

guideline_refs.description: Optional references to clinical guidelines supporting the expected codes. Map from code to a guideline citation. Example: {"E11.22": "ADA Standards of Care 2026: CKD risk stratification in diabetes"}.
